envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Static design substrate. Billing entitles availability; Foundation governance authorizes activation. Baseline DMW + safety + audit included in every plan including Starter / Pilot — never paywalled.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: These seed ledgers are NOT runtime billing state. They are worked examples of the 8 ADR-0083 Amendment 1 §9.7 entitlement objects per plan archetype. A future Founder-authorized B5 slice instantiates the Prisma Entitlement runtime model from these shapes.
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:ENTITLEMENT_LEDGER_REFERENCED at B5+ runtime; no new audit literal at B4

ledger.name: Starter / Pilot Entitlement Ledger Seed
ledger.human_readable_summary: $250 base + 1 admin seat + 2 standard seats baseline. Foundation safety + audit + DMW baseline included. No connector pack entitlement. No advanced governance pack entitlement.
ledger.model_usage_notes: Starter / Pilot is the cheapest plan and still ships the full DMW + safety + audit baseline. This seed proves the canonical 'Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.' invariant at the cheapest plan tier.

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Admin reads the audit viewer at Starter / Pilot
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: Audit viewer is baseline; entitled and governance-authorized at every plan tier.

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Admin tries to activate Slack connector at Starter / Pilot (no Collaboration pack entitlement)
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: Starter / Pilot does not include the Collaboration pack entitlement; admin would need to upgrade to Team or add the pack.

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Anyone tries to access DMW baseline safety regardless of plan
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: Baseline DMW safety is never paywalled per ADR-0083 + RULE 0. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.

governance_review_points: Billing entitles availability; Foundation governance authorizes activation
Baseline DMW safety is never paywalled — included even at Starter / Pilot
Audit chain integrity preserved through every downgrade per RULE 10 + ADR-0002
No employee scoring, no managerial-oversight monitoring, no sensitive-attribute inference regardless of plan tier
Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:ENTITLEMENT_LEDGER_REFERENCED when consumed at B5+ runtime
no new audit literal at B4
